channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-06-03 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [06/03] Ten Million PSI @ Roboto Project
item.description:
A heavy music benefit show for EDC Clinic featuring Flood, Atlas Atrophied, Malleus, Lbs., and visual art by Heather Harper and Cyberemesis.

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/03] Electronic Playground @ The Pitch on Butler
item.description:
A free live electronic music and synthesizer playground event presented by Pittsburgh Modular.

Venue: The Pitch on Butler

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/03] Matador Bolero @ Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)
item.description:
Pittsburgh screening of 'Matador Bolero,' a film by Jonathan Rosado starring Kansas Bowling and Yves Tumor, with 16mm grindhouse trailers presented by Flea Market Films.

Venue: Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/03] The Sonder Bombs with Megan From Work @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Cleveland indie punk band The Sonder Bombs return to Pittsburgh with Megan From Work.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/03] Pallbearer w/ Blood Vulture, Mires @ Spirit
item.description:
Pallbearer performs Foundations of Burden at Spirit

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/03] Deep AF with Cortisoul & DJ Rave Matthews Band @ The Government Center
item.description:
An evening of Deep House jams featuring monthly guest selectors!

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/03] ELIXR @ Goldmark
item.description:
ELIXR is a monthly electronic dance night at The Goldmark featuring DJs Silent G, Triiipgod, Eclectus, and Feels.

Venue: Goldmark

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/04] Cats and Drafts @ Bierport Taproom
item.description:
Hang out with Trash Cat Rescue volunteers and learn more about our adoptable cats!

Venue: Bierport Taproom

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/04] Pretty Cryptid EP Release @ Roboto Project
item.description:
Four local indie rock bands + flash tattoos

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/04] The Funhouse @ Mr. Smalls
item.description:
Kame House presents The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls featuring The Laughing Chimes, Scrum Force, Boy Wonders, and Acid Drag.

Venue: Mr. Smalls

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/04] picknumberthreemyLord! / Debatably Stable / Guillermo Guillotine / You Should Have Brought Me Flowers @ Hippo House
item.description:
A night of emotional hardcore, screamo, emoviolence, and post-hardcore at Hippo-House in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Hippo House

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/04] Babyface Ray and 42 Dugg: 4 The Trenches Tour @ Roxian Theater
item.description:
Babyface Ray and 42 Dugg bring their '4 The Trenches Tour' to Roxian Theatre in Pittsburgh, PA on June 4th.

Venue: Roxian Theater

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/04] ANTiSEEN with The Scratch-N-Sniffs and City Escape Artist @ Spirit
item.description:
Punk legends ANTiSEEN from Charlotte NC play their classic album 'Eat More Possum' at Spirit Lodge in Lawrenceville.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/04] Sounds at the Sauna: Estelle @ Bad Sauna
item.description:
Estelle performs at Sounds at the Sauna on Thursday, June 4.

Venue: Bad Sauna

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/04] Cobwebs Presents: Sinners @ Belvederes
item.description:
Vampire-themed goth dance night

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/05] Three Rivers Arts Festival @ Arts Landing
item.description:
Pittsburgh's beloved free annual arts festival returns to Arts Landing with arts, food, and live music over two weekends in June.

Venue: Arts Landing

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/05] Softspot, 906, & Print at Remedy @ Remedy
item.description:
A live music night at Remedy featuring 906, Soft Spot, and Print.

Venue: Remedy

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/05] Momma with Gaadge
item.description:
Pride Amplified brings indie rock band Momma and opener Gaadge to Mr. Smalls Theatre in Pittsburgh for a celebratory Pride show.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/05] Solya: Queen of Texas Tour 2026 @ Thunderbird
item.description:
Solya brings her Queen of Texas Tour 2026 to Pittsburgh's Thunderbird with special guest Tele Novella.

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/05] Jaguar @ Spirit
item.description:
Persona presents Jaguar, a late-night dance event at Spirit featuring Naomi Duan (NYC), Koopmusik, Dave Clevr, and Repeat Offender.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/05] Funk Tropics @ Side Quest
item.description:
A tropical funk-themed club night featuring Ageless, Funk Masta Fletch, AKA, and Kashmerik at SideQuest in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/05] Cloaca: One Hole, One Whole [pride rave] @ Ask a punk
item.description:
A late-night N/A rave with a dance room and ambient room

Venue: Ask a punk

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] The Unplugged Society presents: The GOLD STAR Party! – Because You’re Doing Great @ Carnegie Free Library of Carnegie
item.description:
Join the Unplugged Society‘s Vernée Smith and Woolly Bear Books for a celebration of YOUR successes: big, small, and in between!

Venue: Carnegie Free Library of Carnegie

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] Cherry Bomb Day Party – 5th Annual Pride Kickoff @ Trace Brewing
item.description:
A free outdoor Pride kickoff day party featuring DJs, live performances, and vendors at Clement Way Alley in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Trace Brewing

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] Unholy Altar with Mo’ynoq, Valletta, Úzkost and Pyromancy at Death Comes Lifting @ Death Comes Lifting
item.description:
Unholy Altar headlines an intimate black metal show with Úzkost and Pyromancy.

Venue: Death Comes Lifting

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] Ditto Crush, Frogonbough, Chameleon Treat, Col Modell @ Telephone
item.description:
Album release show for Limon Skyullz featuring Ditto Crush, Frogonbough, Chameleon Treat, and a reading by Cole Modell at Telephone

Venue: Telephone

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] Shwayze: 7 Day Weekend Tour 2026 @ The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls
item.description:
Shwayze brings the 7 Day Weekend Tour to Pittsburgh with special guest Beach Fly at The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls.

Venue: The Funhouse at Mr. Smalls

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] Title Town Soul & Funk Party @ Spirit
item.description:
An all-vinyl soul and funk dance party featuring guest DJ Mikey Post at Spirit Lodge in Lawrenceville.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] The Gloom Room @ Squirrel Hill Sports Bar
item.description:
A dark and atmospheric night of gothic and occult-themed music and vibes on the ominous date of 6/6/26.

Venue: Squirrel Hill Sports Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] Tony Parmesan
item.description:
Tony Parmesan headlines a 21+ night at Sidequest on 44th with support from Jack M, Keebs, and Fanny Black.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] Bassthetics @ Brillobox
item.description:
A late-night electronic dance event featuring Duffrey, Cam Void, Drucifer, and DJ R.M.B. at Brillobox in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Brillobox

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] Sweet Abyss: Pittsburgh Pride Takeover @ Hot Mass
item.description:
A Pride-themed club night at Hot Mass featuring Carrie Sours, XC-17 b2b Icy Pisces, Kiernan Laveaux b2b Davis Galvin, and Malzoe.

Venue: Hot Mass

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/06] Dropout Drag Divas @ Ask a punk
item.description:
A freaky night of drag, noise, industrial, and rave

Venue: Ask a punk

item.description:
Monthly Event Series Focused on Electronic Music Production

Venue: Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)

item.title: [06/07] Subtitles, 65 Rats, The Catastrophes, Navin & The Jerks @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby @ 222 Ormsby

item.title: [06/07] Gay Lube Wrestling and Birthday Show by Dad's Backyard!
item.description:
A birthday bash for June at the Fairywood Manor ft. Gay Lube Wrestling, Music, and Food

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/07] Honcho Pride Boat with Vicki Powell @ Gateway Clipper
item.description:
Pride weekend boat party with Vicki Powell and Honcho on the Gateway Clipper.

Venue: Gateway Clipper

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/08] Pittsburgh Grindcore Night w/ Morgue Breath, Retorsion, Thlurm Barbaro, Moisty, Mandatory Abortion, Underneath @ Roboto Project
item.description:
ASM Booking presents a 7-band grindcore extravaganza at The Mr. Roboto Project featuring touring acts from California, Hungary, and Indiana.

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/08] Derya Yıldırım & Grup Şimşek @ Tech 25
item.description:
Anatolian folk-psychedelia outfit Derya Yıldırım &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Grup Şimşek live at Tech 25, presented by Secret Planet.

Venue: Tech 25

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/08] Stygian Bough with 40 Watt Sun @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Stygian Bough (a Bell Witch and Aerial Ruin collaboration) performs with 40 Watt Sun (solo) at Bottlerocket Social Hall.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/08] PGHwrites: Damon Young’s “That’s How They Get You” (Paperback Release) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
It's the paperback release of Damon Young's riotous anthology, featuring work by Hanif Abdurraqib, Mahogany L. Browne, Wyatt Cenac, Kiese Laymon, Deesha Philyaw, Roy Wood Jr., Nicola Yoon, and more.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/09] Artist in Exile: Oleksandr Frazé-Frazénko’s Ceramic Knives (Ukrainian Spring Songs) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Join Writer-in-Residence Oleksandr Frazé-Frazénko and wife Mari Frazé-Frazénko as they share their spellbinding sound for a night of reimagined Eastern European songs.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/09] Punk Night w/ The Uncouth, Last Protocol, DJ Drago @ Rock Room
item.description:
A punk-fueled night featuring The Uncouth, Last Protocol, and DJ Drago at the Rock Room.

Venue: Rock Room

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/09] Devon Lamarr & Don Orfio @ Thunderbird
item.description:
Devon Lamarr and Don Orfio perform live at Thunderbird Music Hall on June 9th, 2026.

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/10] Skrom / Hand in Pants / Geese Teeth / Friends for Sale @ Roboto Project
item.description:
A multi-band all-ages show at Mr. Roboto Project featuring Skrom, Hand in Pants, Geese Teeth, and Friends for Sale.

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/10] The Dream Eaters w/ Take Me With You @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
Brooklyn's The Dream Eaters visit Pittsburgh and their bestest friends Take Me With You for a night of synth-pop and dark comedy.

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/10] Turnover with Narrow Head and She's Green @ Spirit
item.description:
Turnover headlines Spirit Hall in Pittsburgh with support from Narrow Head and She's Green on June 10.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/10] Landlady with Pat Kelly @ Baum Baum Club
item.description:
Landlady performs live at Baum Club with support from Pat Kelly on June 10th.

Venue: Baum Baum Club

item.title: [06/11] Achieva N'at @ Helltown Brewing
item.description:
Achieva N'at is your chance to unwind with friends while supporting people with disabilities and their families.

Venue: Helltown Brewing

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/11] Horace Pinker / Fuck Yeah, Dinosaurs / Nightmarathons @ The Government Center
item.description:
A three-band punk/rock show at The Government Center in Pittsburgh featuring Horace Pinker, Fuck Yeah Dinosaurs, and Nightmarathons.

Venue: The Government Center

item.description:

Venue: Spirit

item.title: [06/11] Deceptor, Vicious Blade, and Septic Idols @ Rock Room
item.description:

Venue: Rock Room

item.title: [06/11] Get Dahn Uptown @ Trace Echo
item.description:
A free recurring live music night at Trace Echo every 2nd and 4th Thursday from 8PM to 10PM.

Venue: Trace Echo

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Braddock Art Crawl @ PearlArts Movement &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Sound
item.description:
A multi-venue art crawl along Braddock Ave with the theme 'Art is Out of This World!'

Venue: PearlArts Movement &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Sound

item.title: [06/12] Garden Party: Gothic @ Mattress Factory
item.description:
Mattress Factory's annual Garden Party goes Gothic with performances, dancing, art auction, and costume contest.

Venue: Mattress Factory

item.title: [06/12] Ether.net live at Poetry Lounge @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:

Venue: Poetry Lounge

item.title: [06/12] Shrimp Hat, Almost Exactly Like Julia, Patti Spadaro celebrate new releases @ Allegheny Brewing
item.description:
Come celebrate original music made in Pittsburgh with this trio of indie rock/jam band lineup.

Venue: Allegheny Brewing

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Lawrenceville Pride '26: Opening Night Benefit @ Spirit
item.description:
Lawrenceville Pride's opening night benefit party featuring DJ sets, drag, burlesque, voguing, flash tattoos, and a vendor market at Spirit Lodge.

Venue: Spirit

item.title: [06/12] Unmade Place: Sound Text Experiments @ Telephone
item.description:
An experimental sound and text performance event featuring local and visiting artists at Telephone in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Telephone

item.title: [06/12] Divine Comedy @ Ormsby Cafe
item.description:
Gustav WAV. & Work in Progress present Divine Comedy, a night of Techno, Trance, and Hard Dance at Ormsby Basement.

Venue: Ormsby Cafe

item.title: [06/12] TWIRL: Pride Edition @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
TWIRL returns for a Pride Edition house music party at Bottle Rocket featuring DJs Firestone, Ricky Mawzlin, Rojo, and Smoko.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

item.title: [06/12] Longturn Music Presents: Pleasurekraft @ Side Quest
item.description:

Venue: Side Quest

item.title: [06/12] Sleeping Witch & Saturn, Guest(s) of Kin, Common Loon @ Gooskis
item.description:
A night of reverie featuring Sleeping Witch &amp; Saturn, Guest(s) of Kin, and Common Loon at Gooski's.

Venue: Gooskis

item.title: [06/12] WET: Body Drencher @ Brillobox
item.description:
WET presents Body Drencher with Madame Trio and Gun Ray at Brillobox on Friday June 12th.

Venue: Brillobox

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/12] Fuckboy Summer Vol. 1 @ Gallery AFK
item.description:
A late night, feral summer dance party at Gallery AFK featuring five DJs on a Funktion-One sound system.

Venue: Gallery AFK

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/13] Allentown Night Market @ The Weeping Glass
item.description:
A most curious bi-annual outdoor night market in Pittsburgh's Allentown neighborhood featuring over 100 unusual artists and vendors.

Venue: The Weeping Glass

item.description:
cumbia klezmer punk from Philly meets local party brass

Venue: Pierogi Palace @ Pierogi Palace @ Pierogi Palace @ Pierogi Palace @ Pierogi Palace @ Pierogi Palace @ Pierogi Palace

item.description:
DJ Slugo brings his Longevity Tour to Spirit Lodge in Pittsburgh with support from Seams.

item.description:

Venue: Hippo House

item.description:
A night of Pittsburgh power pop, Cleveland emo, and Pittsburgh rock at Remedy on Butler Street.

item.description:

Venue: Side Quest

item.title: [06/13] VAMP @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Official afterparty to the Allentown Night Market featuring drag performances and DJ Allinaline at BottleRocket Social Hall.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Pittsburgh UFO Club: UFO Conference and UFO Book Sale @ Fungus Books
item.description:
The Pittsburgh UFO Club hosts a UFO conference, book sale, speakers, and poetry at Fungus Books and Records backyard.

Venue: Fungus Books

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Pittsburgh Jazz Listening Session @ Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)
item.description:
Vinyl listening session of classic Pittsburgh jazz recordings.

Venue: Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] PGHwrites: Ed Simon’s “American Elegy: Reflections on 250 Years of the Dis-United States” (Book Launch) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Ed Simon presents 50 short chapters that are asynchronously organized works of flash criticism, meant to draw connections across time periods, which each celebrate an aspect of an expanded and broader “America.”

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Plastic Wildflowers, Bat St. Chip, Some Pepper, Dylan Zeh + @ Incurably Optimistic
item.description:
Accoustic natural and experimental sounds from Plastic Wildflowers, Bat St. Chip, Some Pepper, Dylan Zeh, and more in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Incurably Optimistic

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Doused Sparkler East Coast 2026 - Pittsburgh @ The Government Center
item.description:
Doused Sparkler brings their East Coast 2026 tour to Pittsburgh with support from Blinder and James Castle.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/14] Foundation Improv Series 28 @ Bantha Tea Bar
item.description:
A night of long form improv from the OIL community

Venue: Bantha Tea Bar

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/15] Pocket Gummi / Scrum Force / Deftcat / King Blue Heron @ The Government Center
item.description:
Four-band indie/punk showcase at The Government Center in Pittsburgh, presented by Kame House.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/15] Chamber Music Pittsburgh Presents: The Cowboy Evolves — Journeys Through the Music of the Americas @ City of Asylum
item.description:
This Pittsburgh Performs concert, curated by Carlos Clark, features music by composers from the US, Uruguay, and Brazil, offering a vibrant vision of discovery while simultaneously reflecting on the complex history of the Americas.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/15] Worm at Thunderbird @ Thunderbird
item.description:
NECROMANTIC BLACK DOOM

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.description:

Venue: Skyzone 2
